# AIgnite Insights

> AIgnite Insights helps businesses get found and cited in AI search engines (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews) and put AI to work across their marketing. Services include AI visibility (Answer Engine Optimization), AI strategy and roadmaps, done-for-you AI kits, AI-powered campaigns, and fractional CMO leadership. Founded by Alicia Childers, Chief Strategy Officer and Founder, based in Nashville, Tennessee and serving clients across the US.

AIgnite Insights exists to AIgnite growth, efficiency, and loyalty with AI. The firm is built around two ideas: get found in AI, and put AI to work.

## Services

- [AI Visibility (AEO)](https://aigniteinsights.com/services.html): Get cited and recommended across ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews. Includes audit, implementation, and monthly visibility tracking.
- [AI Strategy & Roadmaps](https://aigniteinsights.com/services.html): A custom AI game plan with prioritized opportunities, an implementation roadmap, ROI projections, and risk assessment.
- [Done-for-You AI Kits](https://aigniteinsights.com/services.html): A handpicked, integrated AI toolkit set up for your stack, with training and 30/60/90 day support.
- [AI-Powered Campaigns](https://aigniteinsights.com/services.html): Marketing campaigns built with AI for speed and performance.
- [Fractional CMO](https://aigniteinsights.com/services.html): Senior marketing leadership on a fractional basis.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://aigniteinsights.com/): Overview of AIgnite Insights and how it helps you get found in AI and put AI to work.
- [Services](https://aigniteinsights.com/services.html): Full service details.
- [Results](https://aigniteinsights.com/results.html): Case studies and outcomes.
- [Resources](https://aigniteinsights.com/resources.html): Articles on AI visibility, AEO, GEO, and applied AI.
- [About](https://aigniteinsights.com/about.html): Alicia Childers and the AIgnite story.
- [Free AI Visibility Snapshot](https://aigniteinsights.com/free-audit.html): See what AI says about your business today.
